active.name: Unbreakable
active.effects: Gain a {{tip|shield}} for 300 {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' health)}} that decays over 5 seconds, and 25% increased [[size]] for the same duration.

effects_structured.raw: Gain a {{tip shield}} for 300 {{as (+ 100% '''bonus''' health)}} that decays over 5 seconds, and 25% increased [[size]] for the same duration.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified page-level Unbreakable semantics: active grants a 300 + 100% bonus-health decaying shield for 5 seconds with 25% size increase for the same duration and a 30-second cooldown.
Player-visible execution note: Unbreakable has no cast time and does not break stealth.
Mode-availability note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped (Prismatic Anvil source); treat non-Arena availability as mode-gated.

Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
